column1: Purpose: Measure which GBP cleanup changes (description / categories / service areas / hours / services / posts / Q&A / photos) actually moved local pack rankings.

How to use: 1) Import this CSV into Google Sheets (File > Import > Upload). 2) Fill the Baseline column BEFORE applying any GBP changes. 3) Log each GBP change in the 'GBP Changes Log' rows below with the date applied. 4) Re-check rankings every Friday for 12 weeks and enter the position (1-3 = in local pack / top three; 4-20 = visible but not in pack; blank or 21+ = not ranking). 5) Compare Week 12 vs Baseline to see which keywords moved.
Position scoring: 1 = top of local pack | 2-3 = local pack | 4-10 = page 1 organic only | 11-20 = page 2 | blank = not in top 20
Capture method: see 'GBP Snapshot Capture Checklist' in section 2.9 of the SEO manual actions guide.
12-Week Review (fill in at end of week 12)
How many keywords moved into the local pack (positions 1-3)?
How many keywords improved by 5+ positions?
Which single GBP change correlated with the biggest jump? (look at the date column)
Which keywords did not move - do they need a different intervention (content / backlinks)?
Next quarter focus (based on the above)
